# CocoStudio

> CocoStudio is a Philippines-based digital entertainment agency founded by Franco Cawagas. We blend creativity, technology, and live entertainment to craft experiences that connect with real people in real time. Headquartered at Symfoni Kamias, Quezon City, Metro Manila, Philippines.

## Contact Information

- **Business Name:** CocoStudio
- **Email:** inquiry@cocostudio.ph
- **Phone:** +63 (0)917-114-7814
- **Address:** Symfoni Kamias, Quezon City, Metro Manila, Philippines
- **Business Hours:** Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Philippine Standard Time)
- **Website:** https://www.cocostudio.ph
- **Social Media:**
  - Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CocoStudioX
  - Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/cocostudio.x/

## Services

CocoStudio offers six core digital entertainment and creative services:

### 1. Design Services
Creative design solutions including branding, logo design, social media content, and promotional materials (posters, flyers, banners). We create customized content for platforms like Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

### 2. Entertainment for Events
Live entertainment for corporate events, brand activations, and private functions. Roster includes brand ambassadors, professional models, dancers (modern, jazz, hip-hop, ethnic, techno, ballroom), aerialists, singers, musicians, and DJs.

### 3. Livestreaming
Professional livestreaming for corporate events, concerts, brand activations, and virtual conferences. Services include multi-camera setups, social media livestreaming (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook), and webinar/conference streaming.

### 4. Photo & Video Production
High-resolution photography and video production across fashion, food, corporate, and lifestyle sectors. Services include product photography, green screen production, custom pictorials, and expert video editing.

### 5. Promotional & Marketing
End-to-end marketing services including social media management, marketing consultation, influencer collaborations, guest appearances, and brand partnerships.

### 6. Web Development
Custom web development including company websites, SaaS platforms, e-commerce solutions, automation systems, and enterprise-grade government systems. Built with modern frameworks, clean code, and focus on speed, security, and UX.

## Founder

**Franco Cawagas** is the Founder & CEO of CocoStudio. He holds a degree in International Management of Entrepreneurship from St. Paul University, Quezon City, and has nearly a decade of hands-on experience in sales and marketing. He founded CocoStudio to provide a full-spectrum solution for events and creative projects under one brand.

## Service Area

CocoStudio primarily serves Metro Manila, Philippines, with services available nationwide for select projects. Our base location is in Quezon City, easily accessible for clients in Manila, Makati, Pasig, Taguig, and surrounding areas.

## Industries Served

- Corporate events and conferences
- Brand activations and product launches
- Live entertainment and concerts
- Fashion and lifestyle brands
- Food and hospitality
- Government and enterprise organizations
- Startups and small businesses

## Booking & Inquiries

To book CocoStudio or request a quote, clients can:
1. Fill out the contact form at https://www.cocostudio.ph/contact
2. Email inquiry@cocostudio.ph
3. Call or message +63 917-114-7814 (Viber and WhatsApp available)
4. Message via Facebook or Instagram

Typical response time: 1–2 business days.

## Portfolio Highlights

- 128+ projects completed
- 56+ clients served
- 7 awards received
- Events and productions across Metro Manila and key Philippine cities
